prevalence.source: European pediatric primary care data and dermatology surveillance

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; morbidity and school absenteeism

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; culture if MRSA suspected or recurrent outbreaks

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions of episodes annually across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with prompt topical or oral antibiotics

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care diagnosis with access to culture in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical antibiotics for limited disease; oral antibiotics for extensive cases; hygiene measures
